tracks.meaning: a complete path or loop through which electric current flows in an electronic device or system
a closed loop of instructions or operations that a program executes repeatedly
a route or journey that forms a closed loop, returning to the starting point
a court of law or the building where legal proceedings are held
a path or course that an actor takes while moving across the stage
a chain or sequence of transactions, meetings, or visits made by a sales representative or executive
a track or course used for racing, typically oval-shaped for running or cycling events
a system of nerves or blood vessels forming a connected pathway in the body
a group of people or things arranged in a circle or linked in sequence
